Runtime Code Browser

핵심 파일 전체를 GitHub처럼 왼쪽에서 고르고, 오른쪽에서 line number와 함께 읽는 정적 코드 브라우저다.

구조 설명 성능 로그 실험 저널 README

Runtime

Filter/Cluster/Track

Control

Viewer

Reporting

Config

Full Code View

이 페이지는 요약이 아니라 전체 코드를 읽는 용도다. 먼저 왼쪽에서 파일을 고르고, 오른쪽에서 전체 코드와 line number를 보면서 필요한 줄로 바로 이동하면 된다.

Runtime

57WORD = [1, 2**8, 2**16, 2**24]
58PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
59DEFAULT_LOG_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / "evidence" / "runtime_logs"
60DEFAULT_ERROR_LOG_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / "docs" / "error"
61DEFAULT_EXPERIMENT_REPORT_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / "docs" / "experiment_reports"
62DEFAULT_PERFORMANCE_LOG_PATH = PROJECT_ROOT / "docs" / "performance_log.md"

143​
144@dataclass
145class ParsedFrame:
146 frame_number: int
147 num_obj: int
148 points: Dict[str, list]
149 packet_bytes: int
150 num_tlv: int
151 sub_frame_number: int
152 parser_latency_ms: float
153​
154​
155@dataclass
156class ReaderStats:
157 bytes_received: int = 0
158 read_calls: int = 0
159 frames_ok: int = 0
160 parse_failures: int = 0
161 resync_events: int = 0
162 invalid_packet_events: int = 0
163 dropped_frames_estimate: int = 0
164 last_frame_number: Optional[int] = None
165​
166​
167@dataclass
168class RuntimeProcessingContext:
169 sensor_yaw_deg: float = 0.0
170 sensor_pitch_deg: float = 0.0
171 sensor_height_m: float = 0.0
172 snr_threshold: float = 8.0
173 max_noise: Optional[float] = None
174 min_range: float = 0.0
175 max_range: Optional[float] = None
176 filter_x_min: Optional[float] = None
177 filter_x_max: Optional[float] = None
178 filter_y_min: Optional[float] = None
179 filter_y_max: Optional[float] = None
180 filter_z_min: Optional[float] = None
181 filter_z_max: Optional[float] = None
182 keepout_boxes: Sequence[AxisAlignedBox] = ()
183 static_clutter_boxes: Sequence[AxisAlignedBox] = ()
184 static_v_min: Optional[float] = None
185 static_max_snr: Optional[float] = None
186 filter_sample_count: int = 0
187 dbscan_eps: float = 0.35
188 dbscan_min_samples: int = 4
189 use_velocity_feature: bool = False
190 dbscan_velocity_weight: float = 0.25
191 dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands: object = None
192​
193​
194@dataclass
195class RuntimeFrameProcessingResult:
196 raw_points: List[dict]
197 filtered_points: List[dict]
198 filter_stats: FilterStats
199 clusters: List[dict]
200 tracks: List[object]
201 pipeline_latency_ms: float
202 dbscan_import_error: Optional[Exception] = None
203​
204​
205@dataclass
206class RuntimeFrameHookPayload:
207 frame: ParsedFrame
208 frame_gap: int
209 frame_ts: float
210 raw_points: List[dict]
211 filtered_points: List[dict]
212 filter_stats: FilterStats
213 clusters: List[dict]
214 tracks: List[object]
215 pipeline_latency_ms: float
216 reader_stats: ReaderStats
217 control_decision: Optional[object] = None
218​
219​
220class CsvRunLogger:
221 def __init__(
222 self,
223 enabled: bool,
224 log_dir: Path,
225 scenario: str,
226 roi_tag: str,
227 enable_text_log: bool = True,
228 ):
229 self.enabled = enabled
230 self.log_dir = log_dir
231 self.scenario = scenario
232 self.roi_tag = roi_tag
233 self.enable_text_log = enable_text_log
234 self.run_id = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
235 self.frame_log_path: Optional[Path] = None
236 self.text_log_path: Optional[Path] = None
237 self.summary_log_path: Optional[Path] = None
238 self._frame_fp = None
239 self._frame_writer = None
240 self._text_fp = None
241​
242 if not enabled:
243 return
244​
245 log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
246 self.frame_log_path = log_dir / f"frames_{self.run_id}.csv"
247 self.summary_log_path = log_dir / "run_summary.csv"
248 if self.enable_text_log:
249 self.text_log_path = log_dir / f"frames_{self.run_id}.log"
250​
251 self._frame_fp = self.frame_log_path.open("w", newline="", encoding="utf-8")
252 if self.text_log_path is not None:
253 self._text_fp = self.text_log_path.open("w", encoding="utf-8")
254 self._frame_writer = csv.DictWriter(
255 self._frame_fp,
256 fieldnames=[
257 "run_id",
258 "scenario",
259 "roi_tag",
260 "wall_time",
261 "elapsed_sec",
262 "frame_number",
263 "frame_gap",
264 "packet_bytes",
265 "num_obj",
266 "num_tlv",
267 "sub_frame_number",
268 "raw_points",
269 "filtered_points",
270 "clusters",
271 "tracks",
272 "filter_ratio",
273 "raw_snr_min",
274 "raw_snr_avg",
275 "raw_snr_p90",
276 "filtered_snr_min",
277 "filtered_snr_avg",
278 "filtered_snr_p90",
279 "raw_range_min",
280 "raw_range_max",
281 "filtered_range_min",
282 "filtered_range_max",
283 "primary_cluster_label",
284 "primary_cluster_range_m",
285 "primary_cluster_size",
286 "primary_cluster_confidence",
287 "primary_track_id",
288 "primary_track_range_m",
289 "primary_track_confidence",
290 "removed_snr",
291 "removed_noise",
292 "removed_range",
293 "removed_axis_roi",
294 "removed_keepout",
295 "removed_near_front_keepout",
296 "removed_right_rail_keepout",
297 "removed_static_clutter",
298 "control_command",
299 "control_event",
300 "control_state",
301 "control_speed_ratio",
302 "control_track_id",
303 "control_zone_distance_m",
304 "control_closing_speed_mps",
305 "control_belt_speed_mps",
306 "control_belt_displacement_m",
307 "control_state_changed",
308 "parser_latency_ms",
309 "pipeline_latency_ms",
310 "parse_failures_so_far",
311 "resync_events_so_far",
312 "dropped_frames_estimate_so_far",
313 "frame_summary",
314 "filter_stats_summary",
315 "filter_sample_preview",
316 "filtered_preview",
317 "cluster_preview",
318 "track_preview",
319 ],
320 )
321 self._frame_writer.writeheader()
322​
323 def log_frame(self, row: Dict[str, object]) -> None:
324 if not self.enabled or self._frame_writer is None:
325 return
326 self._frame_writer.writerow(row)
327 self._frame_fp.flush()
328​
329 def log_text(self, line: str) -> None:
330 if not self.enabled or self._text_fp is None:
331 return
332 self._text_fp.write(line.rstrip("\n") + "\n")
333 self._text_fp.flush()
334​
335 def log_summary(self, row: Dict[str, object]) -> None:
336 if not self.enabled or self.summary_log_path is None:
337 return
338​
339 fieldnames = [
340 "run_id",
341 "started_at",
342 "ended_at",
343 "duration_sec",
344 "scenario",
345 "roi_tag",
346 "config_file",
347 "params_file",
348 "frames_processed",
349 "avg_fps",
350 "avg_packet_bytes",
351 "avg_num_obj",
352 "avg_raw_points",
353 "avg_filtered_points",
354 "avg_clusters",
355 "avg_tracks",
356 "avg_parser_latency_ms",
357 "avg_pipeline_latency_ms",
358 "avg_filter_ratio",
359 "avg_removed_snr",
360 "avg_removed_noise",
361 "avg_removed_range",
362 "avg_removed_axis_roi",
363 "avg_removed_keepout",
364 "avg_removed_near_front_keepout",
365 "avg_removed_right_rail_keepout",
366 "avg_removed_static_clutter",
367 "bytes_received",
368 "read_calls",
369 "parse_failures",
370 "resync_events",
371 "invalid_packet_events",
372 "dropped_frames_estimate",
373 "snr_threshold",
374 "min_range",
375 "max_range",
376 "dbscan_eps",
377 "dbscan_min_samples",
378 "association_gate",
379 "frame_log_path",
380 ]
381 file_exists = self.summary_log_path.exists()
382 existing_rows: List[Dict[str, str]] = []
383 rewrite_header = False
384​
385 if file_exists:
386 with self.summary_log_path.open("r", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as read_fp:
387 reader = csv.DictReader(read_fp)
388 existing_fieldnames = reader.fieldnames or []
389 if existing_fieldnames != fieldnames:
390 rewrite_header = True
391 existing_rows = list(reader)
392​
393 mode = "w" if rewrite_header or not file_exists else "a"
394 with self.summary_log_path.open(mode, newline="", encoding="utf-8") as fp:
395 writer = csv.DictWriter(fp, fieldnames=fieldnames)
396 if not file_exists or rewrite_header:
397 writer.writeheader()
398 if rewrite_header:
399 for existing_row in existing_rows:
400 writer.writerow({key: existing_row.get(key, "") for key in fieldnames})
401 writer.writerow(row)
402​
403 def close(self) -> None:
404 if self._frame_fp is not None:
405 self._frame_fp.close()
406 self._frame_fp = None
407 self._frame_writer = None
408 if self._text_fp is not None:
409 self._text_fp.close()
410 self._text_fp = None
411​
412 def close_frame_log(self) -> None:
413 if self._frame_fp is not None:
414 self._frame_fp.close()
415 self._frame_fp = None
416 self._frame_writer = None
417​
418​
419class MMWaveSerialReader:
420 def __init__(self, max_buffer_size: int = 2**17, debug: bool = False):
421 self.max_buffer_size = max_buffer_size
422 self.byte_buffer = bytearray(max_buffer_size)
423 self.byte_buffer_length = 0
424 self.debug = debug
425 self.stats = ReaderStats()
426​
427 def _append(self, chunk: bytes) -> None:
428 if not chunk:
429 return
430 self.stats.read_calls += 1
431 self.stats.bytes_received += len(chunk)
432 if len(chunk) > self.max_buffer_size:
433 chunk = chunk[-self.max_buffer_size:]
434 free = self.max_buffer_size - self.byte_buffer_length
435 if len(chunk) > free:
436 overflow = len(chunk) - free
437 self._shift_left(min(overflow, self.byte_buffer_length))
438 end = self.byte_buffer_length + len(chunk)
439 self.byte_buffer[self.byte_buffer_length:end] = chunk
440 self.byte_buffer_length = end
441​
442 def _shift_left(self, shift: int) -> None:
443 if shift <= 0:
444 return
445 remain = self.byte_buffer_length - shift
446 if remain > 0:
447 self.byte_buffer[:remain] = self.byte_buffer[shift:self.byte_buffer_length]
448 self.byte_buffer[remain:self.byte_buffer_length] = b"\x00" * shift
449 self.byte_buffer_length = max(0, remain)
450​
451 def read_frame(self, data_port: serial.Serial) -> Optional[ParsedFrame]:
452 parse_t0 = time.perf_counter()
453 self._append(data_port.read(data_port.in_waiting or 1))
454 if self.byte_buffer_length < 16:
455 return None
456​
457 buffer_view = self.byte_buffer[:self.byte_buffer_length]
458 start_idx = buffer_view.find(MAGIC_WORD)
459 if start_idx == -1:
460 if self.byte_buffer_length > 7:
461 self.stats.resync_events += 1
462 self._shift_left(max(0, self.byte_buffer_length - 7))
463 return None
464​
465 if start_idx > 0:
466 self.stats.resync_events += 1
467 self._shift_left(start_idx)
468 buffer_view = self.byte_buffer[:self.byte_buffer_length]
469​
470 if self.byte_buffer_length < 16:
471 return None
472​
473 total_packet_len = int(sum(buffer_view[12 + i] * WORD[i] for i in range(4)))
474 if total_packet_len <= 0 or total_packet_len > self.max_buffer_size:
475 self.stats.invalid_packet_events += 1
476 self._shift_left(1)
477 return None
478​
479 if self.byte_buffer_length < total_packet_len:
480 return None
481​
482 packet = bytes(buffer_view[:total_packet_len])
483 parsed = parser_one_mmw_demo_output_packet(packet, len(packet), self.debug)
484 (
485 parser_result,
486 _header_start_index,
487 total_packet_num_bytes,
488 frame_number,
489 num_det_obj,
490 _num_tlv,
491 _sub_frame_number,
492 detected_x_array,
493 detected_y_array,
494 detected_z_array,
495 detected_v_array,
496 detected_range_array,
497 _detected_azimuth_array,
498 _detected_elevation_array,
499 detected_snr_array,
500 detected_noise_array,
501 ) = parsed
502​
503 shift_size = total_packet_num_bytes if total_packet_num_bytes > 0 else total_packet_len
504 self._shift_left(shift_size)
505​
506 if parser_result != 0:
507 self.stats.parse_failures += 1
508 return None
509​
510 if self.stats.last_frame_number is not None and frame_number > self.stats.last_frame_number + 1:
511 self.stats.dropped_frames_estimate += frame_number - self.stats.last_frame_number - 1
512 self.stats.last_frame_number = frame_number
513 self.stats.frames_ok += 1
514​
515 parser_latency_ms = (time.perf_counter() - parse_t0) * 1000.0
516​
517 points = {
518 "x": detected_x_array,
519 "y": detected_y_array,
520 "z": detected_z_array,
521 "v": detected_v_array,
522 "range": detected_range_array,
523 "snr": detected_snr_array,
524 "noise": detected_noise_array,
525 }
526 return ParsedFrame(
527 frame_number=frame_number,
528 num_obj=num_det_obj,
529 points=points,
530 packet_bytes=total_packet_num_bytes,
531 num_tlv=_num_tlv,
532 sub_frame_number=_sub_frame_number,
533 parser_latency_ms=parser_latency_ms,
534 )
535​
536​
537def send_config(cli_port: serial.Serial, config_file: Path) -> None:
538 def read_cli_lines(quiet_window_sec: float = 0.08, max_wait_sec: float = 0.5) -> List[str]:
539 buffer = ""
540 deadline = time.time() + max_wait_sec
541 quiet_deadline = time.time() + quiet_window_sec
542​
543 while time.time() < deadline:
544 waiting = cli_port.in_waiting
545 if waiting:
546 buffer += cli_port.read(waiting).decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
547 quiet_deadline = time.time() + quiet_window_sec
548 continue
549​
550 if time.time() >= quiet_deadline:
551 break
552 time.sleep(0.01)
553​
554 return [line.strip() for line in buffer.replace("\r", "\n").split("\n") if line.strip()]
555​
556 def is_cli_error(line: str) -> bool:
557 lowered = line.lower()
558 return "error" in lowered or "fail" in lowered
559​
560 startup_lines = read_cli_lines(quiet_window_sec=0.05, max_wait_sec=0.2)
561 for response in startup_lines:
562 print(f"[CFG] << {response}")
563​
564 lines = config_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines()
565 for line in lines:
566 cmd = line.strip()
567 if not cmd or cmd.startswith("%"):
568 continue
569​
570 print(f"[CFG] >> {cmd}")
571 cli_port.write((cmd + "\n").encode("utf-8"))
572 cli_port.flush()
573​
574 responses = read_cli_lines()
575 for response in responses:
576 print(f"[CFG] << {response}")
577 if is_cli_error(response):
578 raise RuntimeError(f"CLI rejected cfg command '{cmd}': {response}")
579​
580 time.sleep(0.01)
581​
582​
583def append_error_log(args: argparse.Namespace, exc: Exception, error_log_dir: Path) -> Path:
584 error_log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
585 log_path = error_log_dir / f"{datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d}.md"
586 timestamp = datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds")
587 command = "python src/parser/tlv_parse_runner.py " + " ".join(sys.argv[1:])
588 traceback_text = traceback.format_exc().strip()
589​
590 is_new_file = not log_path.exists()
591 with log_path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as fp:
592 if is_new_file:
593 fp.write(f"# {datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d} Error Log\n\n")
594 fp.write("- 실행 중 발생한 오류를 날짜별로 누적 기록한다.\n")
595 fp.write("- 같은 날짜에는 새 오류를 파일 아래쪽에 계속 추가한다.\n\n")
596​
597 fp.write(f"## Error {timestamp}\n")
598 fp.write(f"- 명령: `{command}`\n")
599 fp.write(f"- Params file: `{args.params_file}`\n")
600 fp.write(f"- CLI port: `{args.cli_port}`\n")
601 fp.write(f"- Data port: `{args.data_port}`\n")
602 fp.write(f"- Config: `{args.config}`\n")
603 fp.write(f"- Scenario: `{args.scenario}`\n")
604 fp.write(f"- Error type: `{type(exc).__name__}`\n")
605 fp.write(f"- Error message: `{exc}`\n\n")
606 fp.write("```text\n")
607 fp.write(traceback_text + "\n")
608 fp.write("```\n\n")
609​
610 return log_path
611​
612​
613def format_point_preview(points: List[dict], limit: int) -> str:
614 if limit <= 0 or not points:
615 return ""
616​
617 preview_items = []
618 for point in points[:limit]:
619 preview_items.append(
620 f"({point.get('x', 0.0):.2f}, {point.get('y', 0.0):.2f}, {point.get('z', 0.0):.2f})"
621 )
622 return "[" + ", ".join(preview_items) + "]"
623​
624​
625def format_cluster_preview(clusters: List[dict], limit: int) -> str:
626 if limit <= 0 or not clusters:
627 return ""
628​
629 preview_items = []
630 for cluster in clusters[:limit]:
631 preview_items.append(
632 "{"
633 + f"x={cluster.get('x', 0.0):.2f}, y={cluster.get('y', 0.0):.2f}, "
634 + f"z={cluster.get('z', 0.0):.2f}, size={cluster.get('size', 0)}"
635 + "}"
636 )
637 return "[" + ", ".join(preview_items) + "]"
638​
639​
640def format_track_preview(tracks: List[object], limit: int) -> str:
641 if limit <= 0 or not tracks:
642 return ""
643​
644 preview_items = []
645 for track in tracks[:limit]:
646 preview_items.append(
647 "{"
648 + f"id={getattr(track, 'track_id', -1)}, x={getattr(track, 'x', 0.0):.2f}, "
649 + f"y={getattr(track, 'y', 0.0):.2f}, vx={getattr(track, 'vx', 0.0):.2f}, "
650 + f"vy={getattr(track, 'vy', 0.0):.2f}"
651 + "}"
652 )
653 return "[" + ", ".join(preview_items) + "]"
654​
655​
656def _cluster_range_m(cluster: dict) -> float:
657 x = float(cluster.get("x", 0.0))
658 y = float(cluster.get("y", 0.0))
659 z = float(cluster.get("z", 0.0))
660 return math.sqrt((x * x) + (y * y) + (z * z))
661​
662​
663def _track_range_m(track: object) -> float:
664 x = float(getattr(track, "x", 0.0))
665 y = float(getattr(track, "y", 0.0))
666 return math.hypot(x, y)
667​
668​
669def select_primary_cluster(clusters: List[dict]) -> Optional[dict]:
670 if not clusters:
671 return None
672​
673 return min(
674 clusters,
675 key=lambda cluster: (
676 _cluster_range_m(cluster),
677 -float(cluster.get("confidence", 0.0)),
678 -int(cluster.get("size", 0)),
679 ),
680 )
681​
682​
683def select_primary_track(tracks: List[object]) -> Optional[object]:
684 if not tracks:
685 return None
686​
687 return min(
688 tracks,
689 key=lambda track: (
690 _track_range_m(track),
691 -float(getattr(track, "confidence", 0.0)),
692 getattr(track, "track_id", 0),
693 ),
694 )
695​
696​
697def format_primary_target_summary(primary_cluster: Optional[dict], primary_track: Optional[object]) -> str:
698 parts: List[str] = []
699​
700 if primary_cluster is not None:
701 parts.append(
702 "primary_cluster="
703 + "{"
704 + f"label={primary_cluster.get('label', -1)}, "
705 + f"range={_cluster_range_m(primary_cluster):.2f}m, "
706 + f"size={int(primary_cluster.get('size', 0))}"
707 + "}"
708 )
709​
710 if primary_track is not None:
711 parts.append(
712 "primary_track="
713 + "{"
714 + f"id={getattr(primary_track, 'track_id', -1)}, "
715 + f"range={_track_range_m(primary_track):.2f}m, "
716 + f"hits={getattr(primary_track, 'hits', 0)}"
717 + "}"
718 )
719​
720 return " ".join(parts)
721​
722​
723def format_frame_summary(
724 frame: ParsedFrame,
725 frame_gap: int,
726 raw_count: int,
727 filtered_count: int,
728 cluster_count: int,
729 track_count: int,
730 pipeline_latency_ms: float,
731 stats: ReaderStats,
732) -> str:
733 return (
734 f"frame={frame.frame_number} gap={frame_gap} packet={frame.packet_bytes}B "
735 f"num_obj={frame.num_obj} num_tlv={frame.num_tlv} subframe={frame.sub_frame_number} "
736 f"raw={raw_count} filtered={filtered_count} clusters={cluster_count} tracks={track_count} "
737 f"parser_ms={frame.parser_latency_ms:.2f} pipe_ms={pipeline_latency_ms:.2f} "
738 f"parse_failures={stats.parse_failures} resyncs={stats.resync_events} "
739 f"dropped_est={stats.dropped_frames_estimate}"
740 )
741​
742​
743def _fmt_metric(value: Optional[float], digits: int = 2) -> str:
744 if value is None:
745 return "na"
746 return f"{value:.{digits}f}"
747​
748​
749def format_filter_stats_summary(stats: FilterStats) -> str:
750 return (
751 f"filter_ratio={stats.filter_ratio:.2f} "
752 f"raw_snr[min/avg/p90]={_fmt_metric(stats.raw_snr_min)}/{_fmt_metric(stats.raw_snr_avg)}/{_fmt_metric(stats.raw_snr_p90)} "
753 f"filtered_snr[min/avg/p90]={_fmt_metric(stats.filtered_snr_min)}/{_fmt_metric(stats.filtered_snr_avg)}/{_fmt_metric(stats.filtered_snr_p90)} "
754 f"raw_range[min,max]={_fmt_metric(stats.raw_range_min)}/{_fmt_metric(stats.raw_range_max)} "
755 f"filtered_range[min,max]={_fmt_metric(stats.filtered_range_min)}/{_fmt_metric(stats.filtered_range_max)} "
756 f"removed={{snr:{stats.removed_snr}, noise:{stats.removed_noise}, range:{stats.removed_range}, "
757 f"roi:{stats.removed_axis_roi}, keepout:{stats.removed_keepout}, "
758 f"near_front:{stats.removed_near_front_keepout}, right_rail:{stats.removed_right_rail_keepout}, "
759 f"static:{stats.removed_static_clutter}}}"
760 )
761​
762​
763def format_filter_sample_preview(points: List[dict], sample_source: str) -> str:
764 if not points:
765 return ""
766​
767 preview_items = []
768 for point in points:
769 preview_items.append(
770 "{"
771 + f"x={point.get('x', 0.0):.2f}, y={point.get('y', 0.0):.2f}, z={point.get('z', 0.0):.2f}, "
772 + f"snr={point.get('snr', 0.0):.2f}, noise={point.get('noise', 0.0):.2f}, "
773 + f"v={point.get('v', 0.0):.2f}"
774 + "}"
775 )
776 prefix = f"{sample_source}=" if sample_source else ""
777 return prefix + "[" + ", ".join(preview_items) + "]"
778​
779​
780def transform_points_to_world(
781 points: List[dict],
782 yaw_deg: float = 0.0,
783 pitch_deg: float = 0.0,
784 sensor_height_m: float = 0.0,
785) -> List[dict]:
786 if not points:
787 return points
788​
789 yaw_rad = math.radians(float(yaw_deg))
790 cos_yaw = math.cos(yaw_rad)
791 sin_yaw = math.sin(yaw_rad)
792 pitch_rad = math.radians(float(pitch_deg))
793 cos_pitch = math.cos(pitch_rad)
794 sin_pitch = math.sin(pitch_rad)
795 transformed_points: List[dict] = []
796 for point in points:
797 x_val = float(point.get("x", 0.0))
798 y_val = float(point.get("y", 0.0))
799 z_val = float(point.get("z", 0.0))
800​
801 # Positive pitch means the sensor is tilted downward. Convert the
802 # sensor-frame point into a leveled frame before applying yaw.
803 leveled_x = x_val
804 leveled_y = (y_val * cos_pitch) + (z_val * sin_pitch)
805 leveled_z = (-y_val * sin_pitch) + (z_val * cos_pitch)
806​
807 transformed_point = dict(point)
808 transformed_point["x"] = (leveled_x * cos_yaw) - (leveled_y * sin_yaw)
809 transformed_point["y"] = (leveled_x * sin_yaw) + (leveled_y * cos_yaw)
810 transformed_point["z"] = leveled_z + float(sensor_height_m)
811 transformed_point["ground_range"] = math.hypot(transformed_point["x"], transformed_point["y"])
812 transformed_points.append(transformed_point)
813 return transformed_points
814​
815​
816def build_keepout_boxes(
817 near_front_enabled: bool,
818 near_front_distance: float,
819 near_front_half_width: float,
820 near_front_z_min: float,
821 near_front_z_max: float,
822 right_rail_enabled: bool,
823 right_rail_x: float,
824 right_rail_width: float,
825 right_rail_y_start: float,
826 right_rail_length: float,
827 right_rail_z_base: float,
828 right_rail_height: float,
829 right_rail_padding: float,
830) -> List[AxisAlignedBox]:
831 boxes: List[AxisAlignedBox] = []
832 if near_front_enabled:
833 boxes.append(
834 AxisAlignedBox(
835 label="near_front",
836 x_min=-abs(near_front_half_width),
837 x_max=abs(near_front_half_width),
838 y_min=0.0,
839 y_max=max(0.0, near_front_distance),
840 z_min=near_front_z_min,
841 z_max=near_front_z_max,
842 )
843 )
844 if right_rail_enabled:
845 half_width = right_rail_width / 2.0
846 boxes.append(
847 AxisAlignedBox(
848 label="right_rail",
849 x_min=right_rail_x - half_width - right_rail_padding,
850 x_max=right_rail_x + half_width + right_rail_padding,
851 y_min=right_rail_y_start - right_rail_padding,
852 y_max=right_rail_y_start + right_rail_length + right_rail_padding,
853 z_min=right_rail_z_base - right_rail_padding,
854 z_max=right_rail_z_base + right_rail_height + right_rail_padding,
855 )
856 )
857 return boxes
858​
859​
860def build_static_clutter_boxes(
861 enabled: bool,
862 right_rail_x: float,
863 right_rail_width: float,
864 right_rail_y_start: float,
865 right_rail_length: float,
866 right_rail_z_base: float,
867 right_rail_height: float,
868 right_rail_padding: float,
869 static_clutter_padding: float,
870) -> List[AxisAlignedBox]:
871 if not enabled:
872 return []
873​
874 half_width = right_rail_width / 2.0
875 padding = right_rail_padding + static_clutter_padding
876 return [
877 AxisAlignedBox(
878 label="right_rail_static",
879 x_min=right_rail_x - half_width - padding,
880 x_max=right_rail_x + half_width + padding,
881 y_min=right_rail_y_start - padding,
882 y_max=right_rail_y_start + right_rail_length + padding,
883 z_min=right_rail_z_base - padding,
884 z_max=right_rail_z_base + right_rail_height + padding,
885 )
886 ]
887​
888​
889def build_runtime_processing_context(
890 sensor_yaw_deg: float = 0.0,
891 sensor_pitch_deg: float = 0.0,
892 sensor_height_m: float = 0.0,
893 snr_threshold: float = 8.0,
894 max_noise: Optional[float] = None,
895 min_range: float = 0.0,
896 max_range: Optional[float] = None,
897 filter_x_min: Optional[float] = None,
898 filter_x_max: Optional[float] = None,
899 filter_y_min: Optional[float] = None,
900 filter_y_max: Optional[float] = None,
901 filter_z_min: Optional[float] = None,
902 filter_z_max: Optional[float] = None,
903 disable_near_front_keepout: bool = False,
904 near_front_distance: float = 0.3,
905 near_front_half_width: float = 1.1,
906 near_front_z_min: float = -0.5,
907 near_front_z_max: float = 1.5,
908 disable_right_rail_keepout: bool = False,
909 right_rail_x: float = 1.8,
910 right_rail_width: float = 0.35,
911 right_rail_y_start: float = 0.0,
912 right_rail_length: float = 8.0,
913 right_rail_z_base: float = 0.0,
914 right_rail_height: float = 1.0,
915 right_rail_padding: float = 0.15,
916 disable_static_clutter_filter: bool = False,
917 static_clutter_padding: float = 0.25,
918 static_v_min: float = 0.12,
919 static_max_snr: float = 18.0,
920 filter_sample_count: int = 0,
921 dbscan_eps: float = 0.35,
922 dbscan_min_samples: int = 4,
923 use_velocity_feature: bool = False,
924 dbscan_velocity_weight: float = 0.25,
925 dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands: object = None,
926) -> RuntimeProcessingContext:
927 keepout_boxes = build_keepout_boxes(
928 near_front_enabled=not disable_near_front_keepout,
929 near_front_distance=near_front_distance,
930 near_front_half_width=near_front_half_width,
931 near_front_z_min=near_front_z_min,
932 near_front_z_max=near_front_z_max,
933 right_rail_enabled=not disable_right_rail_keepout,
934 right_rail_x=right_rail_x,
935 right_rail_width=right_rail_width,
936 right_rail_y_start=right_rail_y_start,
937 right_rail_length=right_rail_length,
938 right_rail_z_base=right_rail_z_base,
939 right_rail_height=right_rail_height,
940 right_rail_padding=right_rail_padding,
941 )
942 static_clutter_boxes = build_static_clutter_boxes(
943 enabled=not disable_static_clutter_filter,
944 right_rail_x=right_rail_x,
945 right_rail_width=right_rail_width,
946 right_rail_y_start=right_rail_y_start,
947 right_rail_length=right_rail_length,
948 right_rail_z_base=right_rail_z_base,
949 right_rail_height=right_rail_height,
950 right_rail_padding=right_rail_padding,
951 static_clutter_padding=static_clutter_padding,
952 )
953 return RuntimeProcessingContext(
954 sensor_yaw_deg=float(sensor_yaw_deg),
955 sensor_pitch_deg=float(sensor_pitch_deg),
956 sensor_height_m=float(sensor_height_m),
957 snr_threshold=float(snr_threshold),
958 max_noise=max_noise,
959 min_range=float(min_range),
960 max_range=max_range,
961 filter_x_min=filter_x_min,
962 filter_x_max=filter_x_max,
963 filter_y_min=filter_y_min,
964 filter_y_max=filter_y_max,
965 filter_z_min=filter_z_min,
966 filter_z_max=filter_z_max,
967 keepout_boxes=keepout_boxes,
968 static_clutter_boxes=static_clutter_boxes,
969 static_v_min=float(static_v_min),
970 static_max_snr=float(static_max_snr),
971 filter_sample_count=max(0, int(filter_sample_count)),
972 dbscan_eps=float(dbscan_eps),
973 dbscan_min_samples=max(1, int(dbscan_min_samples)),
974 use_velocity_feature=bool(use_velocity_feature),
975 dbscan_velocity_weight=float(dbscan_velocity_weight),
976 dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands=normalize_adaptive_eps_bands(dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands),
977 )
978​
979​
980def process_runtime_frame(
981 frame: ParsedFrame,
982 processing_context: RuntimeProcessingContext,
983 tracker: Optional[MultiObjectKalmanTracker] = None,
984 frame_ts: Optional[float] = None,
985) -> RuntimeFrameProcessingResult:
986 process_t0 = time.perf_counter()
987 effective_frame_ts = time.time() if frame_ts is None else float(frame_ts)
988​
989 raw_points = points_dict_to_list(frame.points, frame.num_obj)
990 raw_points = transform_points_to_world(
991 raw_points,
992 yaw_deg=processing_context.sensor_yaw_deg,
993 pitch_deg=processing_context.sensor_pitch_deg,
994 sensor_height_m=processing_context.sensor_height_m,
995 )
996 filtered_points, filter_stats = preprocess_points(
997 raw_points,
998 snr_threshold=processing_context.snr_threshold,
999 max_noise=processing_context.max_noise,
1000 min_range=processing_context.min_range,
1001 max_range=processing_context.max_range,
1002 x_min=processing_context.filter_x_min,
1003 x_max=processing_context.filter_x_max,
1004 y_min=processing_context.filter_y_min,
1005 y_max=processing_context.filter_y_max,
1006 z_min=processing_context.filter_z_min,
1007 z_max=processing_context.filter_z_max,
1008 exclusion_boxes=processing_context.keepout_boxes,
1009 static_clutter_boxes=processing_context.static_clutter_boxes,
1010 static_v_min=processing_context.static_v_min,
1011 static_max_snr=processing_context.static_max_snr,
1012 sample_preview_count=processing_context.filter_sample_count,
1013 return_stats=True,
1014 )
1015​
1016 clusters: List[dict] = []
1017 dbscan_import_error: Optional[Exception] = None
1018 try:
1019 clusters = cluster_points(
1020 filtered_points,
1021 eps=processing_context.dbscan_eps,
1022 min_samples=processing_context.dbscan_min_samples,
1023 use_velocity_feature=processing_context.use_velocity_feature,
1024 velocity_weight=processing_context.dbscan_velocity_weight,
1025 adaptive_eps_bands=processing_context.dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands,
1026 )
1027 except ImportError as exc:
1028 dbscan_import_error = exc
1029​
1030 tracks: List[object] = []
1031 if tracker is not None:
1032 tracks = tracker.update(clusters, frame_ts=effective_frame_ts)
1033​
1034 return RuntimeFrameProcessingResult(
1035 raw_points=raw_points,
1036 filtered_points=filtered_points,
1037 filter_stats=filter_stats,
1038 clusters=clusters,
1039 tracks=tracks,
1040 pipeline_latency_ms=(time.perf_counter() - process_t0) * 1000.0,
1041 dbscan_import_error=dbscan_import_error,
1042 )
1043​
1044​
1045def run_realtime(
1046 cli_port_name: str,
1047 data_port_name: str,
1048 config_file: str,
1049 duration_sec: Optional[int] = None,
1050 debug: bool = False,
1051 sensor_yaw_deg: float = 0.0,
1052 sensor_pitch_deg: float = 0.0,
1053 sensor_height_m: float = 0.0,
1054 snr_threshold: float = 8.0,
1055 max_noise: Optional[float] = None,
1056 min_range: float = 0.0,
1057 max_range: Optional[float] = 3.0,
1058 filter_x_min: Optional[float] = None,
1059 filter_x_max: Optional[float] = None,
1060 filter_y_min: Optional[float] = None,
1061 filter_y_max: Optional[float] = None,
1062 filter_z_min: Optional[float] = -0.6,
1063 filter_z_max: Optional[float] = 1.0,
1064 disable_near_front_keepout: bool = False,
1065 near_front_distance: float = 0.3,
1066 near_front_half_width: float = 1.1,
1067 near_front_z_min: float = -0.5,
1068 near_front_z_max: float = 1.5,
1069 disable_right_rail_keepout: bool = False,
1070 right_rail_x: float = 1.8,
1071 right_rail_width: float = 0.35,
1072 right_rail_y_start: float = 0.0,
1073 right_rail_length: float = 8.0,
1074 right_rail_z_base: float = 0.0,
1075 right_rail_height: float = 1.0,
1076 right_rail_padding: float = 0.15,
1077 disable_static_clutter_filter: bool = False,
1078 static_clutter_padding: float = 0.25,
1079 static_v_min: float = 0.12,
1080 static_max_snr: float = 18.0,
1081 filter_sample_count: int = 2,
1082 dbscan_eps: float = 0.6,
1083 dbscan_min_samples: int = 4,
1084 use_velocity_feature: bool = False,
1085 dbscan_velocity_weight: float = 0.25,
1086 dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands: object = None,
1087 association_gate: float = 1.5,
1088 max_misses: int = 8,
1089 min_hits: int = 2,
1090 report_miss_tolerance: int = 0,
1091 control_enabled: bool = False,
1092 control_zone_x_min: Optional[float] = None,
1093 control_zone_x_max: Optional[float] = None,
1094 control_zone_y_min: Optional[float] = None,
1095 control_zone_y_max: Optional[float] = None,
1096 control_zone_z_min: Optional[float] = None,
1097 control_zone_z_max: Optional[float] = None,
1098 control_slow_distance: float = 1.5,
1099 control_stop_distance: float = 0.4,
1100 control_resume_distance: float = 2.0,
1101 control_slow_speed_ratio: float = 0.4,
1102 control_approach_speed_threshold: float = 0.15,
1103 control_stopped_speed_threshold: float = 0.06,
1104 control_belt_axis_x: float = 0.0,
1105 control_belt_axis_y: float = 1.0,
1106 control_moving_confirm_sec: float = 0.3,
1107 control_static_hold_sec: float = 0.8,
1108 control_static_disp_window_sec: float = 0.8,
1109 control_static_disp_threshold: float = 0.05,
1110 control_clear_frames: int = 3,
1111 control_out_port: Optional[str] = None,
1112 control_out_baudrate: int = 115200,
1113 control_out_heartbeat_ms: int = 200,
1114 scenario: str = "live_run",
1115 roi_tag: str = "",
1116 log_dir: Optional[str] = None,
1117 disable_file_log: bool = False,
1118 disable_text_log: bool = False,
1119 disable_overview_png: bool = False,
1120 experiment_title: str = "",
1121 experiment_problem: str = "",
1122 experiment_hypothesis: str = "",
1123 experiment_change: str = "",
1124 experiment_next_step: str = "",
1125 coord_preview_count: int = 0,
1126 coord_preview_every: int = 1,
1127 params_file: Optional[str] = None,
1128 console_output: bool = True,
1129 frame_hook: Optional[Callable[[RuntimeFrameHookPayload], Optional[bool]]] = None,
1130) -> None:
1131 config_path = Path(config_file)
1132 params_file_text = str(params_file) if params_file is not None else ""
1133 tracker = None
1134 speed_controller = None
1135 control_writer = None
1136 dbscan_import_error_printed = False
1137 started_at = datetime.now()
1138 logger = CsvRunLogger(
1139 enabled=not disable_file_log,
1140 log_dir=Path(log_dir) if log_dir is not None else DEFAULT_LOG_DIR,
1141 scenario=scenario,
1142 roi_tag=roi_tag,
1143 enable_text_log=not disable_text_log,
1144 )
1145​
1146 def emit_log(line: str) -> None:
1147 if console_output:
1148 print(line)
1149 logger.log_text(line)
1150​
1151 coord_preview_count = max(0, int(coord_preview_count))
1152 coord_preview_every = max(1, int(coord_preview_every))
1153 filter_sample_count = max(0, int(filter_sample_count))
1154 processing_context = build_runtime_processing_context(
1155 sensor_yaw_deg=sensor_yaw_deg,
1156 sensor_pitch_deg=sensor_pitch_deg,
1157 sensor_height_m=sensor_height_m,
1158 snr_threshold=snr_threshold,
1159 max_noise=max_noise,
1160 min_range=min_range,
1161 max_range=max_range,
1162 filter_x_min=filter_x_min,
1163 filter_x_max=filter_x_max,
1164 filter_y_min=filter_y_min,
1165 filter_y_max=filter_y_max,
1166 filter_z_min=filter_z_min,
1167 filter_z_max=filter_z_max,
1168 disable_near_front_keepout=disable_near_front_keepout,
1169 near_front_distance=near_front_distance,
1170 near_front_half_width=near_front_half_width,
1171 near_front_z_min=near_front_z_min,
1172 near_front_z_max=near_front_z_max,
1173 disable_right_rail_keepout=disable_right_rail_keepout,
1174 right_rail_x=right_rail_x,
1175 right_rail_width=right_rail_width,
1176 right_rail_y_start=right_rail_y_start,
1177 right_rail_length=right_rail_length,
1178 right_rail_z_base=right_rail_z_base,
1179 right_rail_height=right_rail_height,
1180 right_rail_padding=right_rail_padding,
1181 disable_static_clutter_filter=disable_static_clutter_filter,
1182 static_clutter_padding=static_clutter_padding,
1183 static_v_min=static_v_min,
1184 static_max_snr=static_max_snr,
1185 filter_sample_count=filter_sample_count,
1186 dbscan_eps=dbscan_eps,
1187 dbscan_min_samples=dbscan_min_samples,
1188 use_velocity_feature=use_velocity_feature,
1189 dbscan_velocity_weight=dbscan_velocity_weight,
1190 dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands=dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands,
1191 )
1192​
1193 total_packet_bytes = 0
1194 total_num_obj = 0
1195 total_raw_points = 0
1196 total_filtered_points = 0
1197 total_clusters = 0
1198 total_tracks = 0
1199 total_parser_latency_ms = 0.0
1200 total_pipeline_latency_ms = 0.0
1201 total_filter_ratio = 0.0
1202 total_removed_snr = 0
1203 total_removed_noise = 0
1204 total_removed_range = 0
1205 total_removed_axis_roi = 0
1206 total_removed_keepout = 0
1207 total_removed_near_front_keepout = 0
1208 total_removed_right_rail_keepout = 0
1209 total_removed_static_clutter = 0
1210 prev_frame_number: Optional[int] = None
1211​
1212 if control_enabled:
1213 required_zone_args = {
1214 "control_zone_x_min": control_zone_x_min,
1215 "control_zone_x_max": control_zone_x_max,
1216 "control_zone_y_min": control_zone_y_min,
1217 "control_zone_y_max": control_zone_y_max,
1218 }
1219 missing_zone_args = [name for name, value in required_zone_args.items() if value is None]
1220 if missing_zone_args:
1221 raise ValueError("Control mode requires zone bounds: " + ", ".join(missing_zone_args))
1222​
1223 control_zone = ControlZone(
1224 x_min=float(control_zone_x_min),
1225 x_max=float(control_zone_x_max),
1226 y_min=float(control_zone_y_min),
1227 y_max=float(control_zone_y_max),
1228 z_min=control_zone_z_min,
1229 z_max=control_zone_z_max,
1230 )
1231 speed_controller = ProximitySpeedController(
1232 control_zone=control_zone,
1233 slow_distance=control_slow_distance,
1234 stop_distance=control_stop_distance,
1235 resume_distance=control_resume_distance,
1236 slow_speed_ratio=control_slow_speed_ratio,
1237 approach_speed_threshold=control_approach_speed_threshold,
1238 stationary_speed_threshold=control_stopped_speed_threshold,
1239 belt_axis_x=control_belt_axis_x,
1240 belt_axis_y=control_belt_axis_y,
1241 moving_confirm_sec=control_moving_confirm_sec,
1242 static_hold_sec=control_static_hold_sec,
1243 static_disp_window_sec=control_static_disp_window_sec,
1244 static_disp_threshold=control_static_disp_threshold,
1245 clear_frames_required=control_clear_frames,
1246 )
1247 emit_log(
1248 "[CTRL] enabled "
1249 f"zone={control_zone.describe()} slow_dist={control_slow_distance:.2f} "
1250 f"stop_dist={control_stop_distance:.2f} resume_dist={control_resume_distance:.2f} "
1251 f"slow_speed={control_slow_speed_ratio:.2f} "
1252 f"belt_axis=({control_belt_axis_x:.2f},{control_belt_axis_y:.2f}) "
1253 f"v_move={control_approach_speed_threshold:.2f} v_static={control_stopped_speed_threshold:.2f} "
1254 f"moving_confirm={control_moving_confirm_sec:.2f}s static_hold={control_static_hold_sec:.2f}s "
1255 f"static_disp_window={control_static_disp_window_sec:.2f}s static_disp={control_static_disp_threshold:.2f}m"
1256 )
1257 if control_out_port is not None:
1258 control_writer = ControlPacketSerialWriter(
1259 port=control_out_port,
1260 baudrate=control_out_baudrate,
1261 heartbeat_interval_ms=control_out_heartbeat_ms,
1262 )
1263 emit_log(
1264 f"[CTRL_TX] port={control_out_port} baud={control_out_baudrate} "
1265 f"heartbeat_ms={control_out_heartbeat_ms}"
1266 )
1267​
1268 try:
1269 tracker = MultiObjectKalmanTracker(
1270 association_gate=association_gate,
1271 max_misses=max_misses,
1272 min_hits=min_hits,
1273 report_miss_tolerance=report_miss_tolerance,
1274 )
1275 except ImportError as exc:
1276 emit_log(f"[WARN] Kalman tracker disabled: {exc}")
1277​
1278 with serial.Serial(cli_port_name, 115200, timeout=0.1) as cli_port, serial.Serial(
1279 data_port_name, 921600, timeout=0.05
1280 ) as data_port:
1281 emit_log(f"[PARAMS] file={params_file_text or 'cli/defaults'}")
1282 emit_log(
1283 "[FILTER_CFG] "
1284 f"sensor_yaw={sensor_yaw_deg:.1f}deg "
1285 f"sensor_pitch={sensor_pitch_deg:.1f}deg "
1286 f"sensor_height={sensor_height_m:.2f}m "
1287 f"axis_roi=x[{filter_x_min if filter_x_min is not None else '-inf'},{filter_x_max if filter_x_max is not None else 'inf'}] "
1288 f"y[{filter_y_min if filter_y_min is not None else '-inf'},{filter_y_max if filter_y_max is not None else 'inf'}] "
1289 f"z[{filter_z_min if filter_z_min is not None else '-inf'},{filter_z_max if filter_z_max is not None else 'inf'}] "
1290 f"near_front={'on' if not disable_near_front_keepout else 'off'} "
1291 f"right_rail={'on' if not disable_right_rail_keepout else 'off'} "
1292 f"static_clutter={'on' if not disable_static_clutter_filter else 'off'} "
1293 f"static_v_min={static_v_min:.2f} static_max_snr={static_max_snr:.2f}"
1294 )
1295 if processing_context.dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands:
1296 adaptive_bands = processing_context.dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands
1297 adaptive_desc = ", ".join(
1298 f"{band['description']}=>eps:{band['eps']:.2f}"
1299 + (
1300 f"/min:{int(band['min_samples'])}"
1301 if band.get("min_samples") is not None
1302 else ""
1303 )
1304 for band in adaptive_bands
1305 )
1306 emit_log(f"[DBSCAN_CFG] adaptive_bands={adaptive_desc}")
1307 else:
1308 emit_log(
1309 f"[DBSCAN_CFG] eps={dbscan_eps:.2f} min_samples={dbscan_min_samples} "
1310 f"velocity_weight={dbscan_velocity_weight:.2f}"
1311 )
1312 send_config(cli_port, config_path)
1313 time.sleep(0.2)
1314 data_port.reset_input_buffer()
1315 reader = MMWaveSerialReader(debug=debug)
1316​
1317 start_time = time.time()
1318 report_t0 = start_time
1319 processed_frames = 0
1320​
1321 try:
1322 while True:
1323 frame = reader.read_frame(data_port)
1324 if frame is not None:
1325 now = time.time()
1326 control_now = time.monotonic()
1327 processed_frames += 1
1328​
1329 frame_result = process_runtime_frame(
1330 frame,
1331 processing_context,
1332 tracker=tracker,
1333 frame_ts=now,
1334 )
1335 raw_points = frame_result.raw_points
1336 filtered_points = frame_result.filtered_points
1337 filter_stats = frame_result.filter_stats
1338 clusters = frame_result.clusters
1339 tracks = frame_result.tracks
1340 pipeline_latency_ms = frame_result.pipeline_latency_ms
1341 if frame_result.dbscan_import_error is not None and not dbscan_import_error_printed:
1342 emit_log(f"[WARN] DBSCAN disabled: {frame_result.dbscan_import_error}")
1343 dbscan_import_error_printed = True
1344​
1345 control_decision = None
1346 if speed_controller is not None:
1347 control_inputs = tracks if tracks else clusters
1348 control_decision = speed_controller.update(control_inputs, frame_ts=control_now)
1349 if control_decision.changed or control_decision.command != "RESUME":
1350 zone_dist_text = (
1351 f"{control_decision.zone_distance_m:.2f}"
1352 if control_decision.zone_distance_m is not None
1353 else "n/a"
1354 )
1355 closing_text = (
1356 f"{control_decision.closing_speed_mps:.2f}"
1357 if control_decision.closing_speed_mps is not None
1358 else "n/a"
1359 )
1360 belt_speed_text = (
1361 f"{control_decision.belt_speed_mps:.2f}"
1362 if control_decision.belt_speed_mps is not None
1363 else "n/a"
1364 )
1365 belt_disp_text = (
1366 f"{control_decision.belt_displacement_m:.2f}"
1367 if control_decision.belt_displacement_m is not None
1368 else "n/a"
1369 )
1370 track_text = control_decision.track_id if control_decision.track_id is not None else "-"
1371 emit_log(
1372 f"[CTRL] event={control_decision.primary_event} cmd={control_decision.command} "
1373 f"state={control_decision.state} speed={control_decision.speed_ratio:.2f} "
1374 f"track={track_text} dist={zone_dist_text}m closing={closing_text}mps "
1375 f"belt_v={belt_speed_text}mps belt_ds={belt_disp_text}m"
1376 )
1377 if control_writer is not None:
1378 encoded_packet = control_writer.send_decision(control_decision)
1379 if encoded_packet is not None and control_decision.changed:
1380 emit_log(
1381 f"[CTRL_TX] seq={encoded_packet.sequence} "
1382 f"cmd={control_decision.command} pct={encoded_packet.speed_ratio_pct}"
1383 )
1384​
1385 frame_gap = 0 if prev_frame_number is None else max(0, frame.frame_number - prev_frame_number - 1)
1386 prev_frame_number = frame.frame_number
1387​
1388 if frame_hook is not None:
1389 hook_result = frame_hook(
1390 RuntimeFrameHookPayload(
1391 frame=frame,
1392 frame_gap=frame_gap,
1393 frame_ts=now,
1394 raw_points=raw_points,
1395 filtered_points=filtered_points,
1396 filter_stats=filter_stats,
1397 clusters=clusters,
1398 tracks=tracks,
1399 pipeline_latency_ms=pipeline_latency_ms,
1400 reader_stats=reader.stats,
1401 control_decision=control_decision,
1402 )
1403 )
1404 if hook_result is False:
1405 break
1406​
1407 total_packet_bytes += frame.packet_bytes
1408 total_num_obj += frame.num_obj
1409 total_raw_points += len(raw_points)
1410 total_filtered_points += len(filtered_points)
1411 total_clusters += len(clusters)
1412 total_tracks += len(tracks)
1413 total_parser_latency_ms += frame.parser_latency_ms
1414 total_pipeline_latency_ms += pipeline_latency_ms
1415 total_filter_ratio += filter_stats.filter_ratio
1416 total_removed_snr += filter_stats.removed_snr
1417 total_removed_noise += filter_stats.removed_noise
1418 total_removed_range += filter_stats.removed_range
1419 total_removed_axis_roi += filter_stats.removed_axis_roi
1420 total_removed_keepout += filter_stats.removed_keepout
1421 total_removed_near_front_keepout += filter_stats.removed_near_front_keepout
1422 total_removed_right_rail_keepout += filter_stats.removed_right_rail_keepout
1423 total_removed_static_clutter += filter_stats.removed_static_clutter
1424​
1425 filtered_preview = ""
1426 cluster_preview = ""
1427 track_preview = ""
1428 filter_sample_preview = format_filter_sample_preview(
1429 filter_stats.sample_points,
1430 filter_stats.sample_source,
1431 )
1432 filter_stats_summary = format_filter_stats_summary(filter_stats)
1433 should_log_preview = coord_preview_count > 0 and (
1434 coord_preview_every <= 1 or frame.frame_number % coord_preview_every == 0
1435 )
1436 if should_log_preview:
1437 filtered_preview = format_point_preview(filtered_points, coord_preview_count)
1438 cluster_preview = format_cluster_preview(clusters, coord_preview_count)
1439 track_preview = format_track_preview(tracks, coord_preview_count)
1440​
1441 primary_cluster = select_primary_cluster(clusters)
1442 primary_track = select_primary_track(tracks)
1443 primary_target_summary = format_primary_target_summary(primary_cluster, primary_track)
1444​
1445 frame_summary = format_frame_summary(
1446 frame=frame,
1447 frame_gap=frame_gap,
1448 raw_count=len(raw_points),
1449 filtered_count=len(filtered_points),
1450 cluster_count=len(clusters),
1451 track_count=len(tracks),
1452 pipeline_latency_ms=pipeline_latency_ms,
1453 stats=reader.stats,
1454 )
1455 emit_log(frame_summary)
1456 emit_log(f" {filter_stats_summary}")
1457 if primary_target_summary:
1458 emit_log(f" {primary_target_summary}")
1459 if filter_sample_preview:
1460 emit_log(f" filter_sample={filter_sample_preview}")
1461 if filtered_preview:
1462 emit_log(f" filtered_xyz={filtered_preview}")
1463 if cluster_preview:
1464 emit_log(f" clusters_xyz={cluster_preview}")
1465 if track_preview:
1466 emit_log(f" tracks_xy={track_preview}")
1467​
1468 logger.log_frame(
1469 {
1470 "run_id": logger.run_id,
1471 "scenario": scenario,
1472 "roi_tag": roi_tag,
1473 "wall_time": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="milliseconds"),
1474 "elapsed_sec": round(now - start_time, 3),
1475 "frame_number": frame.frame_number,
1476 "frame_gap": frame_gap,
1477 "packet_bytes": frame.packet_bytes,
1478 "num_obj": frame.num_obj,
1479 "num_tlv": frame.num_tlv,
1480 "sub_frame_number": frame.sub_frame_number,
1481 "raw_points": len(raw_points),
1482 "filtered_points": len(filtered_points),
1483 "clusters": len(clusters),
1484 "tracks": len(tracks),
1485 "filter_ratio": round(filter_stats.filter_ratio, 4),
1486 "raw_snr_min": round(filter_stats.raw_snr_min, 3) if filter_stats.raw_snr_min is not None else "",
1487 "raw_snr_avg": round(filter_stats.raw_snr_avg, 3) if filter_stats.raw_snr_avg is not None else "",
1488 "raw_snr_p90": round(filter_stats.raw_snr_p90, 3) if filter_stats.raw_snr_p90 is not None else "",
1489 "filtered_snr_min": round(filter_stats.filtered_snr_min, 3) if filter_stats.filtered_snr_min is not None else "",
1490 "filtered_snr_avg": round(filter_stats.filtered_snr_avg, 3) if filter_stats.filtered_snr_avg is not None else "",
1491 "filtered_snr_p90": round(filter_stats.filtered_snr_p90, 3) if filter_stats.filtered_snr_p90 is not None else "",
1492 "raw_range_min": round(filter_stats.raw_range_min, 3) if filter_stats.raw_range_min is not None else "",
1493 "raw_range_max": round(filter_stats.raw_range_max, 3) if filter_stats.raw_range_max is not None else "",
1494 "filtered_range_min": round(filter_stats.filtered_range_min, 3) if filter_stats.filtered_range_min is not None else "",
1495 "filtered_range_max": round(filter_stats.filtered_range_max, 3) if filter_stats.filtered_range_max is not None else "",
1496 "primary_cluster_label": primary_cluster.get("label", "") if primary_cluster is not None else "",
1497 "primary_cluster_range_m": round(_cluster_range_m(primary_cluster), 3) if primary_cluster is not None else "",
1498 "primary_cluster_size": int(primary_cluster.get("size", 0)) if primary_cluster is not None else "",
1499 "primary_cluster_confidence": (
1500 round(float(primary_cluster.get("confidence", 0.0)), 3)
1501 if primary_cluster is not None
1502 else ""
1503 ),
1504 "primary_track_id": getattr(primary_track, "track_id", "") if primary_track is not None else "",
1505 "primary_track_range_m": round(_track_range_m(primary_track), 3) if primary_track is not None else "",
1506 "primary_track_confidence": (
1507 round(float(getattr(primary_track, "confidence", 0.0)), 3)
1508 if primary_track is not None
1509 else ""
1510 ),
1511 "removed_snr": filter_stats.removed_snr,
1512 "removed_noise": filter_stats.removed_noise,
1513 "removed_range": filter_stats.removed_range,
1514 "removed_axis_roi": filter_stats.removed_axis_roi,
1515 "removed_keepout": filter_stats.removed_keepout,
1516 "removed_near_front_keepout": filter_stats.removed_near_front_keepout,
1517 "removed_right_rail_keepout": filter_stats.removed_right_rail_keepout,
1518 "removed_static_clutter": filter_stats.removed_static_clutter,
1519 "control_command": control_decision.command if control_decision is not None else "",
1520 "control_event": control_decision.primary_event if control_decision is not None else "",
1521 "control_state": control_decision.state if control_decision is not None else "",
1522 "control_speed_ratio": round(control_decision.speed_ratio, 3) if control_decision is not None else "",
1523 "control_track_id": control_decision.track_id if control_decision is not None else "",
1524 "control_zone_distance_m": (
1525 round(control_decision.zone_distance_m, 3)
1526 if control_decision is not None and control_decision.zone_distance_m is not None
1527 else ""
1528 ),
1529 "control_closing_speed_mps": (
1530 round(control_decision.closing_speed_mps, 3)
1531 if control_decision is not None and control_decision.closing_speed_mps is not None
1532 else ""
1533 ),
1534 "control_belt_speed_mps": (
1535 round(control_decision.belt_speed_mps, 3)
1536 if control_decision is not None and control_decision.belt_speed_mps is not None
1537 else ""
1538 ),
1539 "control_belt_displacement_m": (
1540 round(control_decision.belt_displacement_m, 3)
1541 if control_decision is not None and control_decision.belt_displacement_m is not None
1542 else ""
1543 ),
1544 "control_state_changed": int(control_decision.changed) if control_decision is not None else "",
1545 "parser_latency_ms": round(frame.parser_latency_ms, 3),
1546 "pipeline_latency_ms": round(pipeline_latency_ms, 3),
1547 "parse_failures_so_far": reader.stats.parse_failures,
1548 "resync_events_so_far": reader.stats.resync_events,
1549 "dropped_frames_estimate_so_far": reader.stats.dropped_frames_estimate,
1550 "frame_summary": frame_summary,
1551 "filter_stats_summary": filter_stats_summary,
1552 "filter_sample_preview": filter_sample_preview,
1553 "filtered_preview": filtered_preview,
1554 "cluster_preview": cluster_preview,
1555 "track_preview": track_preview,
1556 }
1557 )
1558​
1559 elapsed_report = now - report_t0
1560 if elapsed_report >= 1.0:
1561 fps = processed_frames / elapsed_report
1562 emit_log(f"[PERF] fps={fps:.1f} window={elapsed_report:.2f}s")
1563 report_t0 = now
1564 processed_frames = 0
1565​
1566 if duration_sec is not None and (time.time() - start_time) >= duration_sec:
1567 break
1568 finally:
1569 end_time = time.time()
1570 duration = max(end_time - start_time, 1e-9)
1571 frames = reader.stats.frames_ok
1572 summary = {
1573 "run_id": logger.run_id,
1574 "started_at": started_at.isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
1575 "ended_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
1576 "duration_sec": round(duration, 3),
1577 "scenario": scenario,
1578 "roi_tag": roi_tag,
1579 "config_file": str(config_path),
1580 "params_file": params_file_text,
1581 "frames_processed": frames,
1582 "avg_fps": round(frames / duration, 3),
1583 "avg_packet_bytes": round(total_packet_bytes / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1584 "avg_num_obj": round(total_num_obj / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1585 "avg_raw_points": round(total_raw_points / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1586 "avg_filtered_points": round(total_filtered_points / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1587 "avg_clusters": round(total_clusters / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1588 "avg_tracks": round(total_tracks / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1589 "avg_parser_latency_ms": round(total_parser_latency_ms / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1590 "avg_pipeline_latency_ms": round(total_pipeline_latency_ms / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1591 "avg_filter_ratio": round(total_filter_ratio / frames, 4) if frames else 0.0,
1592 "avg_removed_snr": round(total_removed_snr / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1593 "avg_removed_noise": round(total_removed_noise / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1594 "avg_removed_range": round(total_removed_range / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1595 "avg_removed_axis_roi": round(total_removed_axis_roi / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1596 "avg_removed_keepout": round(total_removed_keepout / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1597 "avg_removed_near_front_keepout": round(total_removed_near_front_keepout / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1598 "avg_removed_right_rail_keepout": round(total_removed_right_rail_keepout / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1599 "avg_removed_static_clutter": round(total_removed_static_clutter / frames, 3) if frames else 0.0,
1600 "bytes_received": reader.stats.bytes_received,
1601 "read_calls": reader.stats.read_calls,
1602 "parse_failures": reader.stats.parse_failures,
1603 "resync_events": reader.stats.resync_events,
1604 "invalid_packet_events": reader.stats.invalid_packet_events,
1605 "dropped_frames_estimate": reader.stats.dropped_frames_estimate,
1606 "snr_threshold": snr_threshold,
1607 "min_range": min_range,
1608 "max_range": max_range if max_range is not None else "",
1609 "dbscan_eps": dbscan_eps,
1610 "dbscan_min_samples": dbscan_min_samples,
1611 "association_gate": association_gate,
1612 "frame_log_path": str(logger.frame_log_path) if logger.frame_log_path else "",
1613 }
1614 logger.log_summary(summary)
1615 if control_writer is not None:
1616 control_writer.close()
1617​
1618 overview_png_path: Optional[Path] = None
1619 if not disable_file_log and not disable_overview_png and logger.frame_log_path is not None:
1620 logger.close_frame_log()
1621 try:
1622 overview_png_path = render_runtime_log_overview_png(logger.frame_log_path)
1623 except Exception as exc:
1624 emit_log(f"[WARN] failed to render overview PNG: {exc}")
1625​
1626 experiment_report_path: Optional[Path] = None
1627 experiment_index_path: Optional[Path] = None
1628 performance_log_path: Optional[Path] = None
1629 if not disable_file_log and logger.frame_log_path is not None:
1630 try:
1631 experiment_report_path = render_runtime_experiment_report(
1632 summary=summary,
1633 frame_csv_path=logger.frame_log_path,
1634 report_root=DEFAULT_EXPERIMENT_REPORT_DIR,
1635 text_log_path=logger.text_log_path,
1636 overview_png_path=overview_png_path,
1637 experiment_title=experiment_title,
1638 experiment_problem=experiment_problem,
1639 experiment_hypothesis=experiment_hypothesis,
1640 experiment_change=experiment_change,
1641 experiment_next_step=experiment_next_step,
1642 )
1643 experiment_index_path = update_experiment_report_index(DEFAULT_EXPERIMENT_REPORT_DIR)
1644 except Exception as exc:
1645 emit_log(f"[WARN] failed to render experiment report: {exc}")
1646 try:
1647 performance_log_path = render_performance_log(
1648 run_summary_path=logger.summary_log_path,
1649 output_path=DEFAULT_PERFORMANCE_LOG_PATH,
1650 experiment_report_root=DEFAULT_EXPERIMENT_REPORT_DIR,
1651 )
1652 except Exception as exc:
1653 emit_log(f"[WARN] failed to render performance log: {exc}")
1654​
1655 if not disable_file_log:
1656 emit_log(f"[LOG] frame_log={logger.frame_log_path}")
1657 if logger.text_log_path is not None:
1658 emit_log(f"[LOG] text_log={logger.text_log_path}")
1659 emit_log(f"[LOG] summary_log={logger.summary_log_path}")
1660 if overview_png_path is not None:
1661 emit_log(f"[LOG] overview_png={overview_png_path}")
1662 if experiment_report_path is not None:
1663 emit_log(f"[LOG] experiment_report={experiment_report_path}")
1664 if experiment_index_path is not None:
1665 emit_log(f"[LOG] experiment_index={experiment_index_path}")
1666 if performance_log_path is not None:
1667 emit_log(f"[LOG] performance_log={performance_log_path}")
1668 emit_log(
1669 "[SUMMARY] "
1670 f"frames={frames} avg_fps={summary['avg_fps']:.2f} avg_packet={summary['avg_packet_bytes']:.1f}B "
1671 f"avg_parser_ms={summary['avg_parser_latency_ms']:.2f} avg_filter_ratio={summary['avg_filter_ratio']:.2f} "
1672 f"parse_failures={reader.stats.parse_failures} resyncs={reader.stats.resync_events} "
1673 f"dropped_est={reader.stats.dropped_frames_estimate}"
1674 )
1675 logger.close()
1676​
1677​
1678def build_arg_parser(defaults: Dict[str, object]) -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
1679 parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Real-time TLV reader for IWR6843")
1680 parser.add_argument(
1681 "--params-file",
1682 default=str(DEFAULT_RUNTIME_PARAMS_RELATIVE),
1683 help="JSON runtime parameter file to edit shared tuning values",
1684 )
1685 parser.add_argument("--cli-port", required=True, help="CLI port (e.g. COM6)")
1686 parser.add_argument("--data-port", required=True, help="Data port (e.g. COM5)")
1687 parser.add_argument("--config", required=True, help="Path to mmWave cfg file")
1688 parser.add_argument("--duration", type=int, default=None, help="Run duration in seconds")
1689 parser.add_argument("--debug", action="store_true", help="Enable parser debug output")
1690 parser.add_argument("--sensor-yaw-deg", type=float, default=defaults["sensor_yaw_deg"])
1691 parser.add_argument("--sensor-pitch-deg", type=float, default=defaults["sensor_pitch_deg"])
1692 parser.add_argument("--sensor-height-m", type=float, default=defaults["sensor_height_m"])
1693​
1694 parser.add_argument("--snr-threshold", type=float, default=defaults["snr_threshold"])
1695 parser.add_argument("--max-noise", type=float, default=defaults["max_noise"])
1696 parser.add_argument("--min-range", type=float, default=defaults["min_range"])
1697 parser.add_argument("--max-range", type=float, default=defaults["max_range"])
1698 parser.add_argument("--filter-x-min", type=float, default=defaults["filter_x_min"])
1699 parser.add_argument("--filter-x-max", type=float, default=defaults["filter_x_max"])
1700 parser.add_argument("--filter-y-min", type=float, default=defaults["filter_y_min"])
1701 parser.add_argument("--filter-y-max", type=float, default=defaults["filter_y_max"])
1702 parser.add_argument("--filter-z-min", type=float, default=defaults["filter_z_min"])
1703 parser.add_argument("--filter-z-max", type=float, default=defaults["filter_z_max"])
1704 parser.add_argument("--disable-near-front-keepout", action="store_true", default=defaults["disable_near_front_keepout"])
1705 parser.add_argument("--near-front-distance", type=float, default=defaults["near_front_distance"])
1706 parser.add_argument("--near-front-half-width", type=float, default=defaults["near_front_half_width"])
1707 parser.add_argument("--near-front-z-min", type=float, default=defaults["near_front_z_min"])
1708 parser.add_argument("--near-front-z-max", type=float, default=defaults["near_front_z_max"])
1709 parser.add_argument("--disable-right-rail-keepout", action="store_true", default=defaults["disable_right_rail_keepout"])
1710 parser.add_argument("--right-rail-x", type=float, default=defaults["right_rail_x"])
1711 parser.add_argument("--right-rail-width", type=float, default=defaults["right_rail_width"])
1712 parser.add_argument("--right-rail-y-start", type=float, default=defaults["right_rail_y_start"])
1713 parser.add_argument("--right-rail-length", type=float, default=defaults["right_rail_length"])
1714 parser.add_argument("--right-rail-z-base", type=float, default=defaults["right_rail_z_base"])
1715 parser.add_argument("--right-rail-height", type=float, default=defaults["right_rail_height"])
1716 parser.add_argument("--right-rail-padding", type=float, default=defaults["right_rail_padding"])
1717 parser.add_argument("--disable-static-clutter-filter", action="store_true", default=defaults["disable_static_clutter_filter"])
1718 parser.add_argument("--static-clutter-padding", type=float, default=defaults["static_clutter_padding"])
1719 parser.add_argument("--static-v-min", type=float, default=defaults["static_v_min"])
1720 parser.add_argument("--static-max-snr", type=float, default=defaults["static_max_snr"])
1721 parser.add_argument("--filter-sample-count", type=int, default=defaults["filter_sample_count"])
1722​
1723 parser.add_argument("--dbscan-eps", type=float, default=defaults["dbscan_eps"])
1724 parser.add_argument("--dbscan-min-samples", type=int, default=defaults["dbscan_min_samples"])
1725 parser.add_argument("--use-velocity-feature", action="store_true", default=defaults["use_velocity_feature"])
1726 parser.add_argument("--dbscan-velocity-weight", type=float, default=defaults["dbscan_velocity_weight"])
1727 parser.add_argument(
1728 "--dbscan-adaptive-eps-bands",
1729 default=defaults["dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands"],
1730 help=(
1731 "Adaptive DBSCAN range bands. Accepts JSON list or compact "
1732 "'r_min:r_max:eps[:min_samples],...' format."
1733 ),
1734 )
1735​
1736 parser.add_argument("--association-gate", type=float, default=defaults["association_gate"])
1737 parser.add_argument("--max-misses", type=int, default=defaults["max_misses"])
1738 parser.add_argument("--min-hits", type=int, default=defaults["min_hits"])
1739 parser.add_argument("--report-miss-tolerance", type=int, default=defaults["report_miss_tolerance"])
1740 parser.add_argument("--control-enabled", action="store_true", default=defaults["control_enabled"])
1741 parser.add_argument("--control-zone-x-min", type=float, default=defaults["control_zone_x_min"])
1742 parser.add_argument("--control-zone-x-max", type=float, default=defaults["control_zone_x_max"])
1743 parser.add_argument("--control-zone-y-min", type=float, default=defaults["control_zone_y_min"])
1744 parser.add_argument("--control-zone-y-max", type=float, default=defaults["control_zone_y_max"])
1745 parser.add_argument("--control-zone-z-min", type=float, default=defaults["control_zone_z_min"])
1746 parser.add_argument("--control-zone-z-max", type=float, default=defaults["control_zone_z_max"])
1747 parser.add_argument("--control-slow-distance", type=float, default=defaults["control_slow_distance"])
1748 parser.add_argument("--control-stop-distance", type=float, default=defaults["control_stop_distance"])
1749 parser.add_argument("--control-resume-distance", type=float, default=defaults["control_resume_distance"])
1750 parser.add_argument("--control-slow-speed-ratio", type=float, default=defaults["control_slow_speed_ratio"])
1751 parser.add_argument("--control-approach-speed-threshold", type=float, default=defaults["control_approach_speed_threshold"])
1752 parser.add_argument("--control-stopped-speed-threshold", type=float, default=defaults["control_stopped_speed_threshold"])
1753 parser.add_argument("--control-belt-axis-x", type=float, default=defaults["control_belt_axis_x"])
1754 parser.add_argument("--control-belt-axis-y", type=float, default=defaults["control_belt_axis_y"])
1755 parser.add_argument("--control-moving-confirm-sec", type=float, default=defaults["control_moving_confirm_sec"])
1756 parser.add_argument("--control-static-hold-sec", type=float, default=defaults["control_static_hold_sec"])
1757 parser.add_argument("--control-static-disp-window-sec", type=float, default=defaults["control_static_disp_window_sec"])
1758 parser.add_argument("--control-static-disp-threshold", type=float, default=defaults["control_static_disp_threshold"])
1759 parser.add_argument("--control-clear-frames", type=int, default=defaults["control_clear_frames"])
1760 parser.add_argument("--control-out-port", default=defaults["control_out_port"])
1761 parser.add_argument("--control-out-baudrate", type=int, default=defaults["control_out_baudrate"])
1762 parser.add_argument("--control-out-heartbeat-ms", type=int, default=defaults["control_out_heartbeat_ms"])
1763​
1764 parser.add_argument("--scenario", default=defaults["scenario"])
1765 parser.add_argument("--roi-tag", default=defaults["roi_tag"])
1766 parser.add_argument("--log-dir", default=str(DEFAULT_LOG_DIR))
1767 parser.add_argument("--disable-file-log", action="store_true", default=defaults["disable_file_log"])
1768 parser.add_argument("--disable-text-log", action="store_true", default=defaults["disable_text_log"])
1769 parser.add_argument("--disable-overview-png", action="store_true", default=defaults["disable_overview_png"])
1770 parser.add_argument("--experiment-title", default=defaults["experiment_title"])
1771 parser.add_argument("--experiment-problem", default=defaults["experiment_problem"])
1772 parser.add_argument("--experiment-hypothesis", default=defaults["experiment_hypothesis"])
1773 parser.add_argument("--experiment-change", default=defaults["experiment_change"])
1774 parser.add_argument("--experiment-next-step", default=defaults["experiment_next_step"])
1775 parser.add_argument("--coord-preview-count", type=int, default=defaults["coord_preview_count"])
1776 parser.add_argument("--coord-preview-every", type=int, default=defaults["coord_preview_every"])
1777 parser.add_argument("--error-log-dir", default=str(DEFAULT_ERROR_LOG_DIR))
1778 parser.add_argument("--disable-error-log", action="store_true")
1779 return parser
1780​
1781​
1782def parse_args(argv: Optional[Sequence[str]] = None) -> argparse.Namespace:
1783 argv = list(sys.argv[1:] if argv is None else argv)
1784 params_path, defaults = resolve_runtime_param_defaults(argv, RUNNER_PARAM_DEFAULTS)
1785 parser = build_arg_parser(defaults)
1786 args = parser.parse_args(argv)
1787 try:
1788 args.dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands = normalize_adaptive_eps_bands(args.dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands)
1789 except ValueError as exc:
1790 parser.error(str(exc))
1791 args.params_file = str(params_path)
1792 return args
1793​
1794​
1795def main() -> None:
1796 args = parse_args()
1797​
1798 try:
1799 run_realtime(
1800 cli_port_name=args.cli_port,
1801 data_port_name=args.data_port,
1802 config_file=args.config,
1803 duration_sec=args.duration,
1804 debug=args.debug,
1805 sensor_yaw_deg=args.sensor_yaw_deg,
1806 sensor_pitch_deg=args.sensor_pitch_deg,
1807 sensor_height_m=args.sensor_height_m,
1808 snr_threshold=args.snr_threshold,
1809 max_noise=args.max_noise,
1810 min_range=args.min_range,
1811 max_range=args.max_range,
1812 filter_x_min=args.filter_x_min,
1813 filter_x_max=args.filter_x_max,
1814 filter_y_min=args.filter_y_min,
1815 filter_y_max=args.filter_y_max,
1816 filter_z_min=args.filter_z_min,
1817 filter_z_max=args.filter_z_max,
1818 disable_near_front_keepout=args.disable_near_front_keepout,
1819 near_front_distance=args.near_front_distance,
1820 near_front_half_width=args.near_front_half_width,
1821 near_front_z_min=args.near_front_z_min,
1822 near_front_z_max=args.near_front_z_max,
1823 disable_right_rail_keepout=args.disable_right_rail_keepout,
1824 right_rail_x=args.right_rail_x,
1825 right_rail_width=args.right_rail_width,
1826 right_rail_y_start=args.right_rail_y_start,
1827 right_rail_length=args.right_rail_length,
1828 right_rail_z_base=args.right_rail_z_base,
1829 right_rail_height=args.right_rail_height,
1830 right_rail_padding=args.right_rail_padding,
1831 disable_static_clutter_filter=args.disable_static_clutter_filter,
1832 static_clutter_padding=args.static_clutter_padding,
1833 static_v_min=args.static_v_min,
1834 static_max_snr=args.static_max_snr,
1835 filter_sample_count=args.filter_sample_count,
1836 dbscan_eps=args.dbscan_eps,
1837 dbscan_min_samples=args.dbscan_min_samples,
1838 use_velocity_feature=args.use_velocity_feature,
1839 dbscan_velocity_weight=args.dbscan_velocity_weight,
1840 dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands=args.dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands,
1841 association_gate=args.association_gate,
1842 max_misses=args.max_misses,
1843 min_hits=args.min_hits,
1844 report_miss_tolerance=args.report_miss_tolerance,
1845 control_enabled=args.control_enabled,
1846 control_zone_x_min=args.control_zone_x_min,
1847 control_zone_x_max=args.control_zone_x_max,
1848 control_zone_y_min=args.control_zone_y_min,
1849 control_zone_y_max=args.control_zone_y_max,
1850 control_zone_z_min=args.control_zone_z_min,
1851 control_zone_z_max=args.control_zone_z_max,
1852 control_slow_distance=args.control_slow_distance,
1853 control_stop_distance=args.control_stop_distance,
1854 control_resume_distance=args.control_resume_distance,
1855 control_slow_speed_ratio=args.control_slow_speed_ratio,
1856 control_approach_speed_threshold=args.control_approach_speed_threshold,
1857 control_stopped_speed_threshold=args.control_stopped_speed_threshold,
1858 control_belt_axis_x=args.control_belt_axis_x,
1859 control_belt_axis_y=args.control_belt_axis_y,
1860 control_moving_confirm_sec=args.control_moving_confirm_sec,
1861 control_static_hold_sec=args.control_static_hold_sec,
1862 control_static_disp_window_sec=args.control_static_disp_window_sec,
1863 control_static_disp_threshold=args.control_static_disp_threshold,
1864 control_clear_frames=args.control_clear_frames,
1865 control_out_port=args.control_out_port,
1866 control_out_baudrate=args.control_out_baudrate,
1867 control_out_heartbeat_ms=args.control_out_heartbeat_ms,
1868 scenario=args.scenario,
1869 roi_tag=args.roi_tag,
1870 log_dir=args.log_dir,
1871 disable_file_log=args.disable_file_log,
1872 disable_text_log=args.disable_text_log,
1873 disable_overview_png=args.disable_overview_png,
1874 experiment_title=args.experiment_title,
1875 experiment_problem=args.experiment_problem,
1876 experiment_hypothesis=args.experiment_hypothesis,
1877 experiment_change=args.experiment_change,
1878 experiment_next_step=args.experiment_next_step,
1879 coord_preview_count=args.coord_preview_count,
1880 coord_preview_every=args.coord_preview_every,
1881 params_file=args.params_file,
1882 )
1883 except Exception as exc:
1884 if not args.disable_error_log:
1885 error_log_path = append_error_log(args, exc, Path(args.error_log_dir))
1886 print(f"[ERROR_LOG] saved={error_log_path}")
1887 raise

Runtime

tlv_packet_parser.py

TLV packet을 frame과 point 배열로 해석

원본 파일 열기구조 설명 보기
src/parser/tlv_packet_parser.py
1"""Low-level TLV packet parser for TI mmWave UART output.
2​
3Adapted for real-time use from TI mmWave SDK parser examples.
4"""
5​
6import math
7import struct
8from typing import List, Tuple
9​
10TC_PASS = 0
11TC_FAIL = 1
12​
13HEADER_NUM_BYTES = 40
14MAGIC_WORD = bytes([2, 1, 4, 3, 6, 5, 8, 7])
15​
16​
17def get_uint32(data: bytes) -> int:
18 return data[0] | (data[1] << 8) | (data[2] << 16) | (data[3] << 24)
19​
20​
21def get_uint16(data: bytes) -> int:
22 return data[0] | (data[1] << 8)
23​
24​
25def check_magic_pattern(data: bytes) -> bool:
26 return len(data) >= 8 and data[:8] == MAGIC_WORD
27​
28​
29def parser_helper(data: bytes, read_num_bytes: int, debug: bool = False):
30 header_start_index = data.find(MAGIC_WORD, 0, read_num_bytes)
31​
32 if header_start_index == -1:
33 total_packet_num_bytes = -1
34 frame_number = -1
35 num_det_obj = -1
36 num_tlv = -1
37 sub_frame_number = -1
38 else:
39 total_packet_num_bytes = get_uint32(data[header_start_index + 12:header_start_index + 16])
40 frame_number = get_uint32(data[header_start_index + 20:header_start_index + 24])
41 num_det_obj = get_uint32(data[header_start_index + 28:header_start_index + 32])
42 num_tlv = get_uint32(data[header_start_index + 32:header_start_index + 36])
43 sub_frame_number = get_uint32(data[header_start_index + 36:header_start_index + 40])
44​
45 if debug:
46 print(f"headerStartIndex={header_start_index}")
47 print(f"totalPacketNumBytes={total_packet_num_bytes}")
48 print(f"frameNumber={frame_number}")
49 print(f"numDetObj={num_det_obj}")
50 print(f"numTlv={num_tlv}")
51 print(f"subFrameNumber={sub_frame_number}")
52​
53 return (
54 header_start_index,
55 total_packet_num_bytes,
56 frame_number,
57 num_det_obj,
58 num_tlv,
59 sub_frame_number,
60 )
61​
62​
63def _parse_detected_points_tlv(
64 data: bytes, tlv_start: int, num_det_obj: int
65) -> Tuple[List[float], List[float], List[float], List[float], List[float], List[float], List[float]]:
66 detected_x_array: List[float] = []
67 detected_y_array: List[float] = []
68 detected_z_array: List[float] = []
69 detected_v_array: List[float] = []
70 detected_range_array: List[float] = []
71 detected_azimuth_array: List[float] = []
72 detected_elev_angle_array: List[float] = []
73​
74 offset = 8
75 for _ in range(num_det_obj):
76 x, y, z, v = struct.unpack_from('<ffff', data, tlv_start + offset)
77 xy_range = math.hypot(x, y)
78 comp_detected_range = math.sqrt((x * x) + (y * y) + (z * z))
79 detected_azimuth = math.degrees(math.atan2(x, y))
80​
81 if xy_range == 0.0:
82 detected_elev_angle = 90.0 if z >= 0 else -90.0
83 else:
84 detected_elev_angle = math.degrees(math.atan2(z, xy_range))
85​
86 detected_x_array.append(x)
87 detected_y_array.append(y)
88 detected_z_array.append(z)
89 detected_v_array.append(v)
90 detected_range_array.append(comp_detected_range)
91 detected_azimuth_array.append(detected_azimuth)
92 detected_elev_angle_array.append(detected_elev_angle)
93​
94 offset += 16
95​
96 return (
97 detected_x_array,
98 detected_y_array,
99 detected_z_array,
100 detected_v_array,
101 detected_range_array,
102 detected_azimuth_array,
103 detected_elev_angle_array,
104 )
105​
106​
107def _parse_snr_noise_tlv(data: bytes, tlv_start: int, num_det_obj: int) -> Tuple[List[int], List[int]]:
108 detected_snr_array: List[int] = []
109 detected_noise_array: List[int] = []
110​
111 offset = 8
112 for _ in range(num_det_obj):
113 snr = get_uint16(data[tlv_start + offset:tlv_start + offset + 2])
114 noise = get_uint16(data[tlv_start + offset + 2:tlv_start + offset + 4])
115 detected_snr_array.append(snr)
116 detected_noise_array.append(noise)
117 offset += 4
118​
119 return detected_snr_array, detected_noise_array
120​
121​
122def parser_one_mmw_demo_output_packet(data: bytes, read_num_bytes: int, debug: bool = False):
123 detected_x_array: List[float] = []
124 detected_y_array: List[float] = []
125 detected_z_array: List[float] = []
126 detected_v_array: List[float] = []
127 detected_range_array: List[float] = []
128 detected_azimuth_array: List[float] = []
129 detected_elev_angle_array: List[float] = []
130 detected_snr_array: List[int] = []
131 detected_noise_array: List[int] = []
132 saw_points_tlv = False
133​
134 result = TC_PASS
135​
136 (
137 header_start_index,
138 total_packet_num_bytes,
139 frame_number,
140 num_det_obj,
141 num_tlv,
142 sub_frame_number,
143 ) = parser_helper(data, read_num_bytes, debug)
144​
145 if header_start_index == -1:
146 return (
147 TC_FAIL,
148 header_start_index,
149 total_packet_num_bytes,
150 frame_number,
151 num_det_obj,
152 num_tlv,
153 sub_frame_number,
154 detected_x_array,
155 detected_y_array,
156 detected_z_array,
157 detected_v_array,
158 detected_range_array,
159 detected_azimuth_array,
160 detected_elev_angle_array,
161 detected_snr_array,
162 detected_noise_array,
163 )
164​
165 next_header_start_index = header_start_index + total_packet_num_bytes
166 if header_start_index + total_packet_num_bytes > read_num_bytes:
167 result = TC_FAIL
168 elif next_header_start_index + 8 < read_num_bytes and not check_magic_pattern(
169 data[next_header_start_index:next_header_start_index + 8]
170 ):
171 result = TC_FAIL
172 elif num_det_obj < 0 or sub_frame_number > 3:
173 result = TC_FAIL
174​
175 if result == TC_FAIL:
176 return (
177 result,
178 header_start_index,
179 total_packet_num_bytes,
180 frame_number,
181 num_det_obj,
182 num_tlv,
183 sub_frame_number,
184 detected_x_array,
185 detected_y_array,
186 detected_z_array,
187 detected_v_array,
188 detected_range_array,
189 detected_azimuth_array,
190 detected_elev_angle_array,
191 detected_snr_array,
192 detected_noise_array,
193 )
194​
195 tlv_start = header_start_index + HEADER_NUM_BYTES
196 for _ in range(num_tlv):
197 if tlv_start + 8 > read_num_bytes:
198 result = TC_FAIL
199 break
200​
201 tlv_type = get_uint32(data[tlv_start + 0:tlv_start + 4])
202 tlv_len = get_uint32(data[tlv_start + 4:tlv_start + 8])
203​
204 if tlv_len <= 0 or (tlv_start + 8 + tlv_len) > read_num_bytes:
205 result = TC_FAIL
206 break
207​
208 try:
209 if tlv_type == 1:
210 (
211 detected_x_array,
212 detected_y_array,
213 detected_z_array,
214 detected_v_array,
215 detected_range_array,
216 detected_azimuth_array,
217 detected_elev_angle_array,
218 ) = _parse_detected_points_tlv(data, tlv_start, num_det_obj)
219 saw_points_tlv = True
220 elif tlv_type == 7:
221 detected_snr_array, detected_noise_array = _parse_snr_noise_tlv(data, tlv_start, num_det_obj)
222 except (IndexError, struct.error):
223 result = TC_FAIL
224 break
225​
226 tlv_start += 8 + tlv_len
227​
228 if result == TC_PASS and num_det_obj > 0 and not saw_points_tlv:
229 result = TC_FAIL
230​
231 if len(detected_snr_array) < num_det_obj:
232 detected_snr_array += [0] * (num_det_obj - len(detected_snr_array))
233 detected_noise_array += [0] * (num_det_obj - len(detected_noise_array))
234​
235 return (
236 result,
237 header_start_index,
238 total_packet_num_bytes,
239 frame_number,
240 num_det_obj,
241 num_tlv,
242 sub_frame_number,
243 detected_x_array,
244 detected_y_array,
245 detected_z_array,
246 detected_v_array,
247 detected_range_array,
248 detected_azimuth_array,
249 detected_elev_angle_array,
250 detected_snr_array,
251 detected_noise_array,
252 )

Runtime

runtime_params.py

공용 파라미터 기본값과 JSON override 로더

원본 파일 열기구조 설명 보기
src/runtime_params.py
1"""Shared runtime parameter defaults and JSON loading helpers."""
2​
3from __future__ import annotations
4​
5import argparse
6import json
7from pathlib import Path
8from typing import Any, Dict, Mapping, Sequence, Tuple
9​
10​
11PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
12DEFAULT_RUNTIME_PARAMS_RELATIVE = Path("config") / "runtime_params.json"
13DEFAULT_RUNTIME_PARAMS_PATH = PROJECT_ROOT / DEFAULT_RUNTIME_PARAMS_RELATIVE
14​
15​
16GLOBAL_RUNTIME_PARAM_DEFAULTS: Dict[str, Any] = {
17 "sensor_yaw_deg": 0.0,
18 "sensor_pitch_deg": 0.0,
19 "sensor_height_m": 0.0,
20 "snr_threshold": 110.0,
21 "max_noise": None,
22 "min_range": 0.0,
23 "max_range": 3.0,
24 "filter_x_min": None,
25 "filter_x_max": None,
26 "filter_y_min": None,
27 "filter_y_max": None,
28 "filter_z_min": -0.6,
29 "filter_z_max": 1.0,
30 "disable_near_front_keepout": False,
31 "near_front_distance": 0.3,
32 "near_front_half_width": 1.1,
33 "near_front_z_min": -0.5,
34 "near_front_z_max": 1.5,
35 "disable_right_rail_keepout": False,
36 "right_rail_x": 1.8,
37 "right_rail_width": 0.35,
38 "right_rail_y_start": 0.0,
39 "right_rail_length": 8.0,
40 "right_rail_z_base": 0.0,
41 "right_rail_height": 1.0,
42 "right_rail_padding": 0.05,
43 "disable_static_clutter_filter": False,
44 "static_clutter_padding": 0.25,
45 "static_v_min": 0.12,
46 "static_max_snr": 180.0,
47 "filter_sample_count": 2,
48 "dbscan_eps": 0.35,
49 "dbscan_min_samples": 3,
50 "use_velocity_feature": False,
51 "dbscan_velocity_weight": 0.25,
52 "dbscan_adaptive_eps_bands": [
53 {"r_min": 0.0, "r_max": 1.4, "eps": 0.22},
54 {"r_min": 1.4, "r_max": None, "eps": 0.45},
55 ],
56 "association_gate": 1.5,
57 "max_misses": 8,
58 "min_hits": 2,
59 "report_miss_tolerance": 0,
60 "control_enabled": False,
61 "control_zone_x_min": None,
62 "control_zone_x_max": None,
63 "control_zone_y_min": None,
64 "control_zone_y_max": None,
65 "control_zone_z_min": None,
66 "control_zone_z_max": None,
67 "control_slow_distance": 1.5,
68 "control_stop_distance": 0.4,
69 "control_resume_distance": 2.0,
70 "control_slow_speed_ratio": 0.4,
71 "control_approach_speed_threshold": 0.15,
72 "control_stopped_speed_threshold": 0.06,
73 "control_belt_axis_x": 0.0,
